response.justification: Strong backend and systems foundation, but fundamentally misaligned for a CTO role—only 6 months of agentic-AI production work (insufficient for a role requiring demonstrated multi-agent systems operation at scale), no evidence of team scaling to 30+, fintech infrastructure experience limited to a 15-month role 4+ years ago with no regulated-environment expertise, and current 7-month career gap raises execution concerns for an executive position.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering with senior roles at scale-ups (RIDE, Dunnhumby, re:cinq)
Proven backend and distributed-systems expertise: microservices, event-driven architecture, low-latency async systems
Recent exposure to agentic frameworks at re:cinq with MCP code generators supporting agentic workflows
concerns: Only 6 months of production agentic-AI experience—fundamentally insufficient for a CTO role requiring demonstrated operation of multi-agent systems at scale
No evidence of team scaling from 10→30+ or engineering organization leadership—critical hard requirement for executive role
Fintech infrastructure experience limited to 15 months at RIDE Capital 4+ years ago; zero demonstrated expertise in regulated environments, compliance frameworks, or credit/payment systems

key_factors.factor: Team scaling and engineering leadership track record
